en: So, what do we do? / So what's the plan?
notes: "So" で切り出す

en: So anyway. / So then.
notes: 話を続ける時の接続

en: So, as I was saying.
notes: "as I was saying" =「さっき言ってたように」

en: Going back to what we were saying. / Anyway.
notes: "Anyway" は話を戻す万能ワード

jp: ちょっと話変わるけど。
en: On a different note. / Changing the subject.
notes: "on a different note" はやや丁寧

en: Oh, that reminds me. / Speaking of which.
notes: "speaking of which" は関連する話題に移る時

en: By the way. / Anyway.
notes: "BTW" はテキストの定番略語

jp: まあ、それは置いといて。
en: Anyway. / Let's set that aside.
notes: "set aside" =「置いておく」

en: Let's move on.
notes: "move on" =「次に進む」

en: Let's start with this. / First things first.
notes: "First things first." は定番フレーズ

en: What's next? / What should we do next?
notes: "What's next?" が簡潔

jp: その話はあとでしよう。
en: Let's talk about that later. / We can get to that later.
notes: "get to" =「取りかかる」

jp: それはまた今度でいいや。
en: That can wait. / Another time.
notes: "That can wait." =「急がない」

en: That's it for now. / Let's stop here for now.
notes: "for now" =「今のところ」

en: Let's call it a day.
notes: "call it a day" =「今日はここまでにする」。定番

jp: じゃあ、そろそろ行くね。
en: I should get going. / I'd better head out.
notes: "get going" =「出発する」

en: See you. / Catch you later.
notes: "Catch you later." はカジュアル

en: I'll text you. / I'll be in touch.
notes: "be in touch" =「連絡を取り合う」

en: Let's catch up later. / Talk later.
notes: "catch up" =「近況を話し合う」

en: It was nice talking to you. / Glad we got to talk.
notes: "glad we got to" =「〜できてよかった」

en: Thanks for today.
notes: シンプルで万能

en: Get home safe. / Be careful going home.
notes: "Get home safe." が自然

en: See you tomorrow.
notes: "See ya." はさらにカジュアル

en: I'm going to bed. / I'm heading to bed.
notes: "heading to bed" はカジュアル

jp: この話、いったん終わりにしよう。
en: Let's put this on hold. / Let's table this.
notes: "table" は動詞で「保留にする」（アメリカ英語）

jp: じゃあ結論だけ言うと。
en: So bottom line. / To wrap up.
notes: "bottom line" =「結論」。ビジネスでも日常でも使う

en: Let's go one at a time. / Let's take it step by step.
notes: "one at a time" =「一つずつ」

en: First one. / Number one.
notes: 列挙する時のシンプルな言い方

en: Next. / Second.
notes: "Next up." とも

en: One last thing. / And lastly.
notes: "One last thing." は締めの定番

en: That's a different topic. / That's a whole other thing.
notes: "a whole other thing" =「まったく別の話」

jp: 今はその話じゃなくて。
en: That's not what we're talking about right now.
notes: 脱線を戻す時

en: Let's take a step back. / Let's cool down.
notes: "take a step back" =「一歩引いて落ち着く」

en: Can we skip that?
notes: "skip" =「飛ばす」

en: This is going to be a long one.
notes: "a long one" =「長い話」

en: Should we stop here? / Let's leave it here.
notes: "leave it here" =「ここで止める」

en: Talk to you later. / Later.
notes: "Later." だけで十分カジュアル

jp: このへんにしておこう。
en: Let's leave it at that.
notes: "leave it at that" =「この辺にしておく」
